text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I walk down the hallway on a very<n>rainy day to
find...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...I-I'm sorry, Cafe. I must have<n>brought you bad
luck...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
This is all my fault. If I hadn't asked<n>you to run
with me, it wouldn't have<n>started pouring...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hmm? What's going on?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... I missed what you said... I<n>was too
focused...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: On this drawing.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Draw... ing?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's like a spell... that lets me imagine<n>up a whole
new world in a window,<n>but only on rainy days...
It's fun...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The world in this window is ending<n>though. It will
disappear back into the<n>glassy void... without
ever knowing<n>happiness.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Because the black cat's beloved<n>friend isn't
here.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The black cat... is alone. With no one<n>to rescue
them, unable to express<n>their true feelings...
They're doomed<n>to fade away.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: What? Th-that's so sad...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Because I wasn't able to draw the<n>black cat's
friend, the calico cat...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-then I'll draw it for you! I think I'm<n>okay at
drawing things...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, let's see... It's a calico cat, so I'll<n>draw the
patterns on its body, then its<n>whiskers, and for its
tail...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...U-um! The calico cat has a curled tail.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Aww, that's just like the black cat!<n>Hehe, they
really must be the best of<n>friends!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Cafe! I've been look'n for you!<n>The dorm
lead'r told us t'hurry on<n>back because of the
heavy rain...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Goodness gracious! What'n ador'ble<n>picture
you've got there!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I think it's cute too. Rice made a<n>wonderful
world full of happiness...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: What? B-but all I drew was the calico<n>cat...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The black cat looks happy... because<n>you drew
their calico cat friend.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I'm also very happy. We got to<n>draw together
thanks to the heavy<n>rain.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks to the heavy rain?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Well... Yukino's waiting for me, so I<n>better...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Yep! We should head back before the<n>dorm
lead'r gives us an earf'l!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, um!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-th-thank you! Uh, I may have<n>brought a bunch
of rain...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But I had lots of fun, thanks to you,<n>Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. And I had fun with you. Thank<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And if you don't mind... I'd like you to<n>teach me
how to draw a calico cat<n>sometime.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe cares dearly for her<n>shadow
world, no matter the<n>circumstances. But today,
she's able<n>to create a sweet memory from the
backdrop of pouring rain.
